header.title: Engage & Connect
header.lead: There are many ways to belong here — in worship, in service, and in friendship.

intro: Whether you're new or have been part of our community for years, we invite you to get involved in the ways that feed your spirit.

items.title: Social Justice
items.text: Join our teams working for racial justice, climate action, and a more compassionate world — including our monthly Black Lives Matter vigil.

items.title: Caring & Companioning
items.text: Our Caring Team offers support, meals, and companionship to members during times of need.

items.title: Small Groups & Fellowship
items.text: Connect through covenant groups, Women's TGIF, and other gatherings throughout the year.

items.title: Religious Education
items.text: Programs for children, youth, and adults to explore faith and grow together.

items.title: Music & Choir
items.text: Lend your voice or instrument to our music ministry — no audition required.

items.title: Volunteer
items.text: Ushering, hospitality, building care, and more — every gift matters.

cta.heading: Ready to connect?
cta.text: Reach out and we'll help you find your place.
